data-string="true" data-enter="true" class=" not-display-enter" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div style="padding-left:12px;color:var(--text-caption, #646a73);border-left:2px solid var(--udtoken-quote-bar-bg, #bbbfc4);" class="blockquote"><div class="ace-line line_4qrqj12amn" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">复用 Draft 视频使用 </span><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">模型、提示词、输入图片、种子值、音频设置、视频宽高比、视频时长等</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true"> 生成正式视频，保证视频关键要素一致。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div></div></div><div class="ep-ranges ignore-dom"></div><div class="ep-cursors ignore-dom"></div></div></td></tr></tbody><iframe src="//about:blank" frameborder="0" class="tb-scrollable-stunt"></iframe></table></div><div class="tb-scrollable-shadow tb-scrollable-shadow-left juice-ignore-node-class ignore-dom" style="width: 0px; bottom: 15px;"></div><div class="tb-scrollable-shadow tb-scrollable-shadow-right juice-ignore-node-class ignore-dom" style="width: 0px; bottom: 15px;"></div><div class="ignore-dom"></div></div></div></div></div></span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" class=" not-display-enter" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_46e600uxsh" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">本功能使用分为两步：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_46i7u0uyj5 heading-h3" data-node="true" dir="auto"><div id="13ae3900"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">Step1: 生成 Draft 视频</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div><div class="ace-line line_46lkm0uzo6 list-div list-start-number1" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="1" start="1" data-start="1"><li start="1" data-start="1"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">设置 </span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">"draft": true</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">，调用</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">POST /contents/generations/tasks</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">接口创建 Draft 视频生成任务。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ol></div><div class="ace-line line_46nxs0v090 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="2" start="2" data-start="2"><li start="2" data-start="2"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">调用</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">GET /contents/generations/tasks/{id}</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">接口查询生成状态和结果，下载 Draft 视频，确认是否符合预期。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ol></div><div style="margin-top:12px;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid;border-radius:8px;background-color:#fafbfc;border-color:#eaedf1;" class="volc-doc-editor-tips-wrapper"><div class="ace-line line_46pq20v121" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">说明</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_46rvz0v2ov list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">仅 Seedance 1.5 pro 支持该功能。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_46u0i0v329 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">仅支持 480p 分辨率（使用其他分辨率会报错），不支持返回尾帧功能，不支持离线推理功能。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_46vo30v46c list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">Draft 视频的 token 单价不变，消耗的 token 更少。</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Draft视频token用量 = 正常视频token用量 × 折算系数</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">，以 Seedance 1.5 pro 为例，有声视频的折算系数为 0.6，故生成一个 Draft 有声视频的价格是正常视频的 0.6 倍，显著降低了成本。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div></div><div class="ace-line line_p0dUoFuS" data-node="true" dir="auto" contenteditable="false"><span data-leaf="true"><div class="doc-tabs-container"><span data-rect-container="true"><span data-zero-space="true" style="position: absolute; width: 0px; height: 0px; display: inline-block;">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span><span data-fake-text=" " contenteditable="false" class="doc-tabs-embed"><div class="doc-tabs-title-container"><div class="doc-tabs-title-wrapper"><div class="doc-tabs-title"><div class="doc-tabs-title-item active">Curl</div><div class="doc-tabs-title-item false">Python</div><div class="doc-tabs-title-item false">Java</div><div class="doc-tabs-title-item false">Go</div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden;">创建 Draft 视频任务并轮询任务状态；
当任务状态变为 succeeded后，您可在 content.video_url 字段处，下载生成的 Draft 视频文件，检视效果是否符合预期。若不符合预期，可重新调整参数并再次创建 Draft 视频生成任务。当确认 Draft 视频效果符合预期后，即可按照后续步骤生成最终视频。
import os
import time
# Install SDK:  pip install 'volcengine-python-sdk[ark]'
from volcenginesdkarkruntime import Ark 

# Make sure that you have stored the API Key in the environment variable ARK_API_KEY
# Initialize the Ark client to read your API Key from an environment variable
client = Ark(
    # This is the default path. You can configure it based on the service location
    base_url="https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3",
    # Get API Key：https://console.volcengine.com/ark/region:ark+cn-beijing/apikey
    api_key=os.environ.get("ARK_API_KEY"),
)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("----- create request -----")
    create_result = client.content_generation.tasks.create(
        model="doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215", # Replace with Model ID
        content=[
            {
                # Combination of text prompt and parameters
                "type": "text",
                "text": "女孩抱着狐狸，女孩睁开眼，温柔地看向镜头，狐狸友善地抱着，镜头缓缓拉出，女孩的头发被风吹动"  
            },
            {
                # The URL of the first frame image
                "type": "image_url",
                "image_url": {
                    "url": "https://ark-project.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/doc_image/i2v_foxrgirl.png"
                }
            }
        ],
        seed= 20,
        duration= 6,
        draft= True,
    )
    print(create_result)
    
    # Polling query section
    print("----- polling task status -----")
    task_id = create_result.id
    while True:
        get_result = client.content_generation.tasks.get(task_id=task_id)
        status = get_result.status
        if status == "succeeded":
            print("----- task succeeded -----")
            print(get_result)
            break
        elif status == "failed":
            print("----- task failed -----")
            print(f"Error: {get_result.error}")
            break
        else:
            print(f"Current status: {status}, Retrying after 10 seconds...")
            time.sleep(10)
 
创建 Draft 视频任务并轮询任务状态；
当任务状态变为 succeeded后，您可在 content.video_url 字段处，下载生成的 Draft 视频文件，检视效果是否符合预期。若不符合预期，可重新调整参数并再次创建 Draft 视频生成任务。当确认 Draft 视频效果符合预期后，即可按照后续步骤生成最终视频。
package com.ark.sample;

import com.volcengine.ark.runtime.model.content.generation.*;
import com.volcengine.ark.runtime.model.content.generation.CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest.Content;
import com.volcengine.ark.runtime.service.ArkService;
import okhttp3.ConnectionPool;
import okhttp3.Dispatcher;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

public class ContentGenerationTaskExample {
    // Make sure that you have stored the API Key in the environment variable ARK_API_KEY
    // Initialize the Ark client to read your API Key from an environment variable
    static String apiKey = System.getenv("ARK_API_KEY");
    static ConnectionPool connectionPool = new ConnectionPool(5, 1, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    static Dispatcher dispatcher = new Dispatcher();
    static ArkService service = ArkService.builder()
           .baseUrl("https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3") // The base URL for model invocation
           .dispatcher(dispatcher)
           .connectionPool(connectionPool)
           .apiKey(apiKey)
           .build();
           
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        String model = "doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215"; // Replace with Model ID
        Long seed = 20L;
        Long duration = 6L;
        Boolean draft = true;
        System.out.println("----- create request -----");
        List&lt;Content&gt; contents = new ArrayList&lt;&gt;();
        
        // Combination of text prompt and parameters
        contents.add(Content.builder()
                .type("text")
                .text("女孩抱着狐狸，女孩睁开眼，温柔地看向镜头，狐狸友善地抱着，镜头缓缓拉出，女孩的头发被风吹动")
                .build());
        // The URL of the first frame image
        contents.add(Content.builder()
                .type("image_url")
                .imageUrl(CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest.ImageUrl.builder()
                        .url("https://ark-project.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/doc_image/i2v_foxrgirl.png")
                        .build())
                .build());

        // Create a video generation task
        CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest createRequest = CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest.builder()
                .model(model)
                .content(contents)
                .seed(seed)
                .duration(duration)
                .draft(draft)
                .build();

        CreateContentGenerationTaskResult createResult = service.createContentGenerationTask(createRequest);
        System.out.println(createResult);

        // Get the details of the task
        String taskId = createResult.getId();
        GetContentGenerationTaskRequest getRequest = GetContentGenerationTaskRequest.builder()
                .taskId(taskId)
                .build();

        // Polling query section
        System.out.println("----- polling task status -----");
        while (true) {
            try {
                GetContentGenerationTaskResponse getResponse = service.getContentGenerationTask(getRequest);
                String status = getResponse.getStatus();
                if ("succeeded".equalsIgnoreCase(status)) {
                    System.out.println("----- task succeeded -----");
                    System.out.println(getResponse);
                    break;
                } else if ("failed".equalsIgnoreCase(status)) {
                    System.out.println("----- task failed -----");
                    System.out.println("Error: " + getResponse.getStatus());
                    break;
                } else {
                    System.out.printf("Current status: %s, Retrying in 10 seconds...", status);
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(10);
                }
            } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                System.err.println("Polling interrupted");
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}
 
创建 Draft 视频任务并轮询任务状态；
当任务状态变为 succeeded后，您可在 content.video_url 字段处，下载生成的 Draft 视频文件，检视效果是否符合预期。若不符合预期，可重新调整参数并再次创建 Draft 视频生成任务。当确认 Draft 视频效果符合预期后，即可按照后续步骤生成最终视频。
package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "time"
    "os"

    "github.com/volcengine/volcengine-go-sdk/service/arkruntime"
    "github.com/volcengine/volcengine-go-sdk/service/arkruntime/model"
    "github.com/volcengine/volcengine-go-sdk/volcengine"
)

func main() {
    // Make sure that you have stored the API Key in the environment variable ARK_API_KEY
    // Initialize the Ark client to read your API Key from an environment variable
    client := arkruntime.NewClientWithApiKey(
        // Get your API Key from the environment variable. This is the default mode and you can modify it as required
        os.Getenv("ARK_API_KEY"),
        // The base URL for model invocation
        arkruntime.WithBaseUrl("https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3"),
    )
    ctx := context.Background()
    // Replace with Model ID
    modelEp := "doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215"

    // Generate a task
    fmt.Println("----- create request -----")
    createReq := model.CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest{
        Model: modelEp,
        Seed:          volcengine.Int64(20),
        Duration:      volcengine.Int64(6),
        Draft:         volcengine.Bool(true),
        Content: []*model.CreateContentGenerationContentItem{
            {
                // Combination of text prompt and parameters
                Type: model.ContentGenerationContentItemTypeText,
                Text: volcengine.String("女孩抱着狐狸，女孩睁开眼，温柔地看向镜头，狐狸友善地抱着，镜头缓缓拉出，女孩的头发被风吹动"),
            },
            {
                // The URL of the first frame image
                Type: model.ContentGenerationContentItemTypeImage,
                ImageURL: &amp;model.ImageURL{
                    URL: "https://ark-project.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/doc_image/i2v_foxrgirl.png",
                },
            },
        },
    }
    createResp, err := client.CreateContentGenerationTask(ctx, createReq)
    if err != nil {
        fmt.Printf("create content generation error: %v", err)
        return
    }
    taskID := createResp.ID
    fmt.Printf("Task Created with ID: %s", taskID)

    // Polling query section
    fmt.Println("----- polling task status -----")
    for {
        getReq := model.GetContentGenerationTaskRequest{ID: taskID}
        getResp, err := client.GetContentGenerationTask(ctx, getReq)
        if err != nil {
            fmt.Printf("get content generation task error: %v", err)
            return
        }

        status := getResp.Status
        if status == "succeeded" {
            fmt.Println("----- task succeeded -----")
            fmt.Printf("Task ID: %s \n", getResp.ID)
            fmt.Printf("Model: %s \n", getResp.Model)
            fmt.Printf("Video URL: %s \n", getResp.Content.VideoURL)
            fmt.Printf("Completion Tokens: %d \n", getResp.Usage.CompletionTokens)
            fmt.Printf("Created At: %d, Updated At: %d", getResp.CreatedAt, getResp.UpdatedAt)
            return
        } else if status == "failed" {
            fmt.Println("----- task failed -----")
            if getResp.Error != nil {
                fmt.Printf("Error Code: %s, Message: %s", getResp.Error.Code, getResp.Error.Message)
            }
            return
        } else {
            fmt.Printf("Current status: %s, Retrying in 10 seconds... \n", status)
            time.Sleep(10 * time.Second)
        }
    }
}

cgt-2026****-pzjqb with the ID acquired from last step</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div><div class="ace-line line_xJn9naUI" class="ace-line line_SfwZpDIG" data-node="true" dir="auto"><div class="code-line-wrapper" data-line-num="4"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">  -H </span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_4ulma13wi6" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">当任务状态变为 succeeded 后，您可在 content.</span><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">video_url</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true"> 字段处，下载生成的 Draft 视频文件，检视效果是否符合预期。若不符合预期，可重新调整参数并再次创建 Draft 视频生成任务。当确认 Draft 视频效果符合预期后，即可按照后续步骤生成最终视频。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div></div></div></span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" class=" not-display-enter" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_46xd10v5kp heading-h3" data-node="true" dir="auto"><div id="015173ef"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">Step2: 基于 Draft 视频生成正式视频</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div><div class="ace-line line_46z830v6ga" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">如果确认 Draft 视频符合预期，可基于 Step1 返回的 Draft 视频任务 ID，再次调用</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">POST /contents/generations/tasks</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">接口，生成最终视频。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div style="margin-top:12px;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid;border-radius:8px;background-color:#fafbfc;border-color:#eaedf1;" class="volc-doc-editor-tips-wrapper"><div class="ace-line line_470vx0v710" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">说明</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_4734x0v83s list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">平台将自动复用 Draft 视频使用的用户输入（ </span><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">model、</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">content.</span><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">text、</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">content.</span><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">image_url、generate_audio、seed、ratio、duration、camera_fixed</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true"> ），生成正式视频。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_475g40v99e list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">其余参数支持指定，不指定将使用本模型的默认值。例如：指定正式视频的分辨率、是否包含水印、是否使用离线推理、是否返回尾帧等。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_477340va0p list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">基于 Draft 视频生成最终视频属于正常推理过程，按照正常视频消耗 token 量计费。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_47a0l0vbkb list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">Draft 视频任务 ID 的有效期为 7 天（从 </span><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">created at</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true"> 时间戳开始计算），超时后将无法使用该 Draft 视频生成正式视频。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div></div><div class="ace-line line_FuupeoPR" data-node="true" dir="auto" contenteditable="false"><span data-leaf="true"><div class="doc-tabs-container"><span data-rect-container="true"><span data-zero-space="true" style="position: absolute; width: 0px; height: 0px; display: inline-block;">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span><span data-fake-text=" " contenteditable="false" class="doc-tabs-embed"><div class="doc-tabs-title-container"><div class="doc-tabs-title-wrapper"><div class="doc-tabs-title"><div class="doc-tabs-title-item active">Curl</div><div class="doc-tabs-title-item false">Python</div><div class="doc-tabs-title-item false">Java</div><div class="doc-tabs-title-item false">Go</div></div></div></div><div style="height: 0px; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden;">基于content.draft_task.id (此 ID 通过 Step1 的返回信息获取）创建视频生成任务并轮询获取任务状态；
当任务状态变为 succeeded 后，您可在 content.video_url 字段处，下载生成的视频文件。
import os
import time
# Install SDK:  pip install 'volcengine-python-sdk[ark]'
from volcenginesdkarkruntime import Ark 

# Make sure that you have stored the API Key in the environment variable ARK_API_KEY
# Initialize the Ark client to read your API Key from an environment variable
client = Ark(
    # This is the default path. You can configure it based on the service location
    base_url="https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3",
    # Get API Key：https://console.volcengine.com/ark/region:ark+cn-beijing/apikey
    api_key=os.environ.get("ARK_API_KEY"),
)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("----- create request -----")
    create_result = client.content_generation.tasks.create(
        model="doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215", # Replace with Model ID
        content=[
            {
                "type": "draft_task",
                "draft_task": {
                    "id": "cgt-2026****-pzjqb"
                }
            }
        ],
        watermark= False,
        resolution= "720p",
        return_last_frame= True,
        service_tier= "default",
    )
    print(create_result)
    
    # Polling query section
    print("----- polling task status -----")
    task_id = create_result.id
    while True:
        get_result = client.content_generation.tasks.get(task_id=task_id)
        status = get_result.status
        if status == "succeeded":
            print("----- task succeeded -----")
            print(get_result)
            break
        elif status == "failed":
            print("----- task failed -----")
            print(f"Error: {get_result.error}")
            break
        else:
            print(f"Current status: {status}, Retrying after 10 seconds...")
            time.sleep(10)
 
基于content.draft_task.id (此 ID 通过 Step1 的返回信息获取）创建视频生成任务并轮询获取任务状态；
当任务状态变为 succeeded 后，您可在 content.video_url 字段处，下载生成的视频文件。
package com.ark.sample;

import com.volcengine.ark.runtime.model.content.generation.*;
import com.volcengine.ark.runtime.model.content.generation.CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest.Content;
import com.volcengine.ark.runtime.service.ArkService;
import okhttp3.ConnectionPool;
import okhttp3.Dispatcher;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

public class ContentGenerationTaskExample {
    // Make sure that you have stored the API Key in the environment variable ARK_API_KEY
    // Initialize the Ark client to read your API Key from an environment variable
    static String apiKey = System.getenv("ARK_API_KEY");
    static ConnectionPool connectionPool = new ConnectionPool(5, 1, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    static Dispatcher dispatcher = new Dispatcher();
    static ArkService service = ArkService.builder()
           .baseUrl("https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3") // The base URL for model invocation
           .dispatcher(dispatcher)
           .connectionPool(connectionPool)
           .apiKey(apiKey)
           .build();
           
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        String model = "doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215"; // Replace with Model ID
        Boolean watermark = false;
        String resolution = "720p";
        Boolean returnLastFrame = true;
        String serviceTier = "default";
        System.out.println("----- create request -----");
        List&lt;Content&gt; contents = new ArrayList&lt;&gt;();
        
        // Combination of text prompt and parameters
        contents.add(Content.builder()
                .type("draft_task")
                .draftTask(CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest.DraftTask.builder()
                        .id("cgt-2026****-pzjqb")
                        .build())
                 .build());
                        

        // Create a video generation task
        CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest createRequest = CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest.builder()
                .model(model)
                .content(contents)
                .watermark(watermark)
                .resolution(resolution)
                .returnLastFrame(returnLastFrame)
                .serviceTier(serviceTier)
                .build();

        CreateContentGenerationTaskResult createResult = service.createContentGenerationTask(createRequest);
        System.out.println(createResult);

        // Get the details of the task
        String taskId = createResult.getId();
        GetContentGenerationTaskRequest getRequest = GetContentGenerationTaskRequest.builder()
                .taskId(taskId)
                .build();

        // Polling query section
        System.out.println("----- polling task status -----");
        while (true) {
            try {
                GetContentGenerationTaskResponse getResponse = service.getContentGenerationTask(getRequest);
                String status = getResponse.getStatus();
                if ("succeeded".equalsIgnoreCase(status)) {
                    System.out.println("----- task succeeded -----");
                    System.out.println(getResponse);
                    break;
                } else if ("failed".equalsIgnoreCase(status)) {
                    System.out.println("----- task failed -----");
                    System.out.println("Error: " + getResponse.getStatus());
                    break;
                } else {
                    System.out.printf("Current status: %s, Retrying in 10 seconds...", status);
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(10);
                }
            } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                System.err.println("Polling interrupted");
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}
 
基于content.draft_task.id (此 ID 通过 Step1 的返回信息获取）创建视频生成任务并轮询获取任务状态；
当任务状态变为 succeeded 后，您可在 content.video_url 字段处，下载生成的视频文件。
package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "time"
    "os"

    "github.com/volcengine/volcengine-go-sdk/service/arkruntime"
    "github.com/volcengine/volcengine-go-sdk/service/arkruntime/model"
    "github.com/volcengine/volcengine-go-sdk/volcengine"
)

func main() {
    // Make sure that you have stored the API Key in the environment variable ARK_API_KEY
    // Initialize the Ark client to read your API Key from an environment variable
    client := arkruntime.NewClientWithApiKey(
        // Get your API Key from the environment variable. This is the default mode and you can modify it as required
        os.Getenv("ARK_API_KEY"),
        // The base URL for model invocation
        arkruntime.WithBaseUrl("https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3"),
    )
    ctx := context.Background()
    // Replace with Model ID
    modelEp := "doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215"

    // Generate a task
    fmt.Println("----- create request -----")
    createReq := model.CreateContentGenerationTaskRequest{
        Model: modelEp,
         Watermark:         volcengine.Bool(false),
         Resolution:        volcengine.String("720p"),
         ReturnLastFrame:   volcengine.Bool(true),
         ServiceTier:       volcengine.String("default"),
        Content: []*model.CreateContentGenerationContentItem{
            {
                Type:      model.ContentGenerationContentItemTypeDraftTask,
                DraftTask: &amp;model.DraftTask{ID: "cgt-2026****-pzjqb"},
            },
        },
    }

    createResp, err := client.CreateContentGenerationTask(ctx, createReq)
    if err != nil {
        fmt.Printf("create content generation error: %v", err)
        return
    }
    taskID := createResp.ID
    fmt.Printf("Task Created with ID: %s", taskID)

    // Polling query section
    fmt.Println("----- polling task status -----")
    for {
        getReq := model.GetContentGenerationTaskRequest{ID: taskID}
        getResp, err := client.GetContentGenerationTask(ctx, getReq)
        if err != nil {
            fmt.Printf("get content generation task error: %v", err)
            return
        }

        status := getResp.Status
        if status == "succeeded" {
            fmt.Println("----- task succeeded -----")
            fmt.Printf("Task ID: %s \n", getResp.ID)
            fmt.Printf("Model: %s \n", getResp.Model)
            fmt.Printf("Video URL: %s \n", getResp.Content.VideoURL)
            fmt.Printf("Completion Tokens: %d \n", getResp.Usage.CompletionTokens)
            fmt.Printf("Created At: %d, Updated At: %d", getResp.CreatedAt, getResp.UpdatedAt)
            return
        } else if status == "failed" {
            fmt.Println("----- task failed -----")
            if getResp.Error != nil {
                fmt.Printf("Error Code: %s, Message: %s", getResp.Error.Code, getResp.Error.Message)
            }
            return
        } else {
            fmt.Printf("Current status: %s, Retrying in 10 seconds... \n", status)
            time.Sleep(10 * time.Second)
        }
    }
}

class="ace-line line_48g020vowa list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">RPM 限流：账号下同模型（区分模型版本）每分钟允许创建的任务数量上限。若超过该限制，创建视频生成任务时会报错。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_48j6f0vp98 data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_48m330vq86 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">不同模型的限制值不同，详见</span><span class="outer-u-container demo-outer-link-container" data-inline-wrapper="true"><span data-leaf="true"><a style="cursor:pointer;" class="url hyperlink-href:/docs/82379/1330310#2705b333 hyperlink-linkId:kouUXRi4zL " contenteditable="false" id="" data-id="kouUXRi4zL" data-href="/docs/82379/1330310#2705b333" data-leaf="true">。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_48p3w0vr66" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span line_48s770vs6e list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">TPD 限流：账号在一天内对同一模型（区分模型版本）的总调用 token 上限。超过此限制的调用请求将被拒绝。不同模型的 TPD 限流值不同，详见</span><span class="outer-u-container demo-outer-link-container" data-inline-wrapper="true"><span data-leaf="true"><a style="cursor:pointer;" class="url hyperlink-href:/docs/82379/1330310#2705b333 hyperlink-linkId:uddmeMdV1F " contenteditable="false" id="" data-id="uddmeMdV1F" data-href="/docs/82379/1330310#2705b333" href="/docs/82379/1330310#2705b333" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span contenteditable="false"><span data-string="true">视频生成能力</span></span></a></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_48vzl0vtaw heading-h2" data-node="true" dir="auto"><div id="f76aafc8"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">图片裁剪规则</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div><div class="ace-line line_490q60vu09" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" style="font-weight:bold;" data-leaf="true">Seedance 系列模型的图生视频场景，支持设置生成视频的宽高比。</span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">当选择的视频宽高与您上传的图片宽高比不一致时，方舟会对您的图片进行裁剪，裁剪时会居中裁剪。详细规则如下：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div style="margin-top:12px;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid;border-radius:8px;background-color:#fafbfc;border-color:#eaedf1;" class="volc-doc-editor-tips-wrapper"><div class="ace-line line_493fb0vvh3" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">说明</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div><div class="ace-line line_496qp0vwbr" data-node="true" dir="auto"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">若要呈现出较好的视频效果，建议所指定的视频宽高比（ratio）与实际上传图片的宽高比尽可能接近。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></div></div><div class="ace-line line_4996x0vx7a list-div list-start-number1" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="1" start="1" data-start="1"><li start="1" data-start="1"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">输入参数：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ol></div><div class="ace-line line_49c0s0vyjt list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">原始图片宽度记为</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">W</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（单位：像素），高度记为</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">H</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（单位：像素）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_49hlp0vzro list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">目标比例记为</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">A:B</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（例如，21:9），这表示裁剪后的宽度与高度之比应为 </span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">A/B</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（如 21/9≈2.333）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_49kbe0w0hz list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="2" start="2" data-start="2"><li start="2" data-start="2"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">比较宽高比：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ol></div><div class="ace-line line_49o690w14x list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">计算原始图片的宽高比</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Ratio_原始=W/H</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_49sbf0w2z3 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">计算目标比例的比值</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Ratio_目标=A/B</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（例如，21:9 的 Ratio目标=21/9≈2.333)。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_49wps0w3jh list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet1 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">根据比较结果，决定裁剪基准：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_49z2y0w4ge list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">如果</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Ratio_原始&lt;Ratio_目标</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（即原始图片“太高”或“竖高”），则以宽度为基准裁剪。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4a2k60w5j7 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">如果</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Ratio_原始&gt;Ratio_目标</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（即原始图片“太宽”或“横宽”），则以高度为基准裁剪。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4agbk0w6v1 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">如果相等，则无需裁剪，直接使用全图。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4ajdr0w7z2 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="3" start="3" data-start="3"><li start="3" data-start="3"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪尺寸计算（量化公式）：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ol></div><div class="ace-line line_4alp90w8d3 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">以宽度为基准（适用于竖高图片）：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4apyb0w9lu list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet3 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪宽度</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Crop_W=W</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（使用整个原始宽度）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4asan0wark list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet3 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪高度</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Crop_H=(B/A)×W</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（根据目标比例等比例计算高度）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4aw770wb6g list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet3 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪区域的起始坐标（居中定位）：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4ayf20wcfu list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet4 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">X 坐标（水平）：总是 0（因为宽度全用，从左侧开始）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4b14r0wdm3 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet4 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">Y 坐标（垂直）：</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">(H−Crop_H)/2</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（确保垂直居中，从顶部开始）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4b4ht0wen8 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">以高度为基准（适用于横宽图片）：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4b7ci0wfx2 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet3 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪高度</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Crop_H=H</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（使用整个原始高度）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4b9oj0wg51 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet3 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪宽度</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Crop_W=(A/B)×H</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（根据目标比例等比例计算宽度）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4bc0b0whc7 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet3 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪区域的起始坐标（居中定位）：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4bekz0wi24 list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet4 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">X 坐标（水平）：</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">(W−Crop_W)/2</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">（确保水平居中，从左侧开始）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4bhsr0wjbc list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet4 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">Y 坐标（垂直）：总是 0（因为高度全用，从顶部开始）。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4bjvw0wkmf list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="4" start="4" data-start="4"><li start="4" data-start="4"><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪结果：</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ol></div><div class="ace-line line_4bmaq0wl6w list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">最终裁剪出的图片尺寸为</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">Crop_W×Crop_H</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">，比例严格为</span><span data-leaf="true"><span class="inline-code inline-code_start inline-code_end" spellcheck="false"><span data-string="true">A:B</span></span></span><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">，且完全位于原始图片内部，无黑边。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4bqdo0wmwt list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ul class="list-bullet2 r-list r-list-bullet"><li><span data-string="true" data-leaf="true">裁剪区域总是以原始图片中心为基准，因此内容居中。</span><span data-string="true" data-enter="true" data-leaf="true">&ZeroWidthSpace;</span></li></ul></div><div class="ace-line line_4btlg0wn7x list-div" data-node="true" dir="auto"><ol class="list-number1 r-list r-list-number" data-origin-start="5" start="5" data-start="5"><li start="5" data-start="5"><span
